items.issue: appHeading hardcodes heading: "Search for a place of destination", duplicating the controller's pageTitle value; the old code passed the pageTitle variable, so the <title> and h1 can now drift if the controller string changes
items.fix: Pass the context variable instead: appHeading({ pageTitle: "Address", heading: pageTitle })

items.issue: appHeading lost its caption: old call passed caption: 'Description of the goods' (rendered as govuk-caption-m); new call is { heading: 'Commodity' } only, so the 'Description of the goods' caption is dropped — a content change in a layout-only ticket, and inconsistent with sibling commodities/details/index.njk which keeps pageTitle: 'Description of the goods'.
items.fix: If the caption was intended to stay, use { pageTitle: 'Description of the goods', heading: 'Commodity' } to match commodities/details; otherwise confirm the removal is intended.

items.issue: After removing the govuk-grid-row / govuk-grid-column-two-thirds wrapper divs, lines 17-82 keep the old two-level indentation that those divs justified, leaving the block body over-indented relative to the new structure.
items.fix: Re-indent the block body (the govuk-body div, form, table, selects) to match the removed wrapper nesting.

items.issue: appHeading call dropped the caption "Description of the goods" (old: { caption, text: "Commodity" } -> new: { heading: "Commodity" }); the rename text->heading is a fix since the macro reads params.heading, but the caption removal is user-visible content unrelated to the layout-width goal.
items.fix: Confirm the caption removal is intentional; if not, pass caption: "Description of the goods" alongside heading.

items.issue:
Empty

spacer (line 10) sits inside the

(opened line 3, closed line 14); a

is flow content and is invalid nested inside a heading element, producing a malformed DOM on every appHeading call that passes a caption.
items.fix:
Move the caption out of the

; render the caption after the heading and drop the nested

spacer, using a margin utility on the heading/caption instead.

items.issue:
Empty

elements on lines 1 and 10 are used purely as vertical spacers; non-semantic empty paragraphs are an accessibility smell (screen readers may announce an empty element) and GDS spacing guidance applies margin utilities to real content, not empty tags.
items.fix:
Remove the empty spacer

s and apply a govuk-!-margin-* utility (or govuk-caption spacing) to the heading/caption elements themselves.

items.issue: Renaming the inner block to pageContent leaves 3 pages (about/index.njk, error/index.njk, auth/unauthorised.njk) still overriding {% block content %}, so they bypass the new govuk-grid-column-full wrapper and keep their own two-thirds grid — width is no longer 'defined in one place' for them.
items.fix: Migrate about, error and unauthorised templates to {% block pageContent %} and drop their local govuk-grid-row/two-thirds wrappers, or record in the ticket that these pages intentionally stay two-thirds.
